history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with curly dark hair stands in the foreground, looking directly at the camera with a slight smile. He is wearing a white polo shirt with black racing-style graphics and the number "13" on the left chest, and light grey sweatpants. He holds a dark rectangular object, possibly a phone, in his right hand. His left leg is crossed over his right, and he's wearing white Nike sneakers with black accents.

The background suggests an outdoor seating area at night. To his left, there's a shallow pool of water with lush green plants and subtle lighting reflecting on the water's surface. Behind him, a textured grey wall forms the backdrop. Further in the background, to the right, a couple is seated at a table, with one person wearing a hijab. The overall lighting is dim and atmospheric, with artificial lights casting soft glows and shadows on the tiled floor. The color palette is dominated by muted tones of white, grey, green, and the dark tones of the night sky and shadows, creating a relaxed and casual evening ambiance. The style is photographic and realistic.
